summary: Tested two changes: (1) Hero section redesign on homepage, (2) Category filter bar on Operational Library. Both are fully working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero redesign and filter bar both verified working. Hero: subheadline, clarifier box, primary/secondary CTAs, 4 stats, LPOS-RISK-ANALYSIS label all pass. KnowledgeCenter: 7 filter buttons visible, filtering works correctly (New Entrant = 2 articles [posts 1&8], Authority Registration = 2 articles [posts 2&5], All = 8), result count label updates, active filter is amber. All 8 article cards navigate correctly.
